name: POWELL INDUSTRIES INC
summary: Powell Industries, Inc. is a Delaware corporation founded in 1947 that develops, designs, manufactures, and services custom-engineered equipment and systems for distributing, controlling, and monitoring electrical energy. Products include integrated power control room substations, E-Houses, switchgear, motor control centers, medium-voltage circuit breakers, and monitoring systems. The company primarily serves oil and gas, petrochemical, electric utility, and commercial/industrial markets, with operations headquartered in Houston, Texas and international subsidiaries in Canada, the UK, and internationally.
